nasb.text: I will also give you into the hands of your lovers, and they will tear down your shrines, demolish your high places, strip you of your clothing, take away your jewels, and will leave you naked and bare.

esv.text: And I will give you into their hands, and they shall throw down your vaulted chamber and break down your lofty places. They shall strip you of your clothes and take your beautiful jewels and leave you naked and bare.

cnv.text: 我要把你交在他們手裡，他們要拆毀你的高岡，破壞你的高壇，剝去你的衣服，奪去你美麗的珠寶，只留下你赤露的身軀。

ccb.text: 我要把你交在你的情人手里。他们必拆毁你的祭坛，夷平你高高的神庙，剥去你的衣裳，夺走你的珠宝，留下你赤身露体。
